title: Responsible Conduct of Research (RCR) — D-RED Seminar Slides (Isuk, 2021)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2021-02-01 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Responsible Conduct of Research (RCR)' presented by Edet Isuk. File 'RCR-Presentation-2020a-gen.pdf' served as the standalone RCR deck. Distinct from form_rcr_powerpoint, form_rcr_isuk_2022_newfaculty, and form_dred_2022_11_isuk_rcr.
